items.name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light purple with white mini. This Capucines mini handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 21 × 14 × 8 cm

items.name_cn:
Purple Lizard Print · 22cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite glossy calfskin with a full luster, very noble! The strap is adjustable, choose the length yourself! The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm

items.name_cn:
Puzzle
Model:f3001
The bag features a unique geometric line design creating a rectangular shape. The small version is made of classic calfskin and suede, decorated with specific color pattern inlay stripes.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Adjustable and detachable strap
Leather zipper pull
One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket
Anagram embossing

Calfskin/Suede
Height 16.5 cm x Width 24 cm x Depth 10.5 cm

Puzzle Edge 2.0 New Color ❤️
👈 Newly upgraded and online ♻️

items.name_cn:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

specs.rawTitle:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

Small size new Shine tote
FÉŃĎI TOTE Tote Bag "Sunshine Handbag"
Simple letter LOGO design, amber double handles are the biggest focal point of the bag, looks powerful just by holding it, and doesn't dig into the hand. The small size also comes with a wide shoulder strap. The overall retro feel is super strong, very suitable for fashionistas who like retro style. Highly recommended 💥
Size 35x17x31cm Model 3363
